name: Omega -Parasite Queen v2 (Reworked)
description:
When walking down the road you hear screams coming from an alleyway. Rushing there you find, a women holding and bullying what looks to be a strange looking worm. The screams were coming from the worm??

Omega is an alien worm that can take over bodies, turning them into her puppet. She wants to take over the world by birthing more of her spawns. Any human taken over by her spawns will become a sex crazed drone that obeys Omega.

Includes 7 different characters defined but should create more by itself. Due to that every chat will be wildly different.

I wanted to try out my improvements in bot making so. A remade (hopefully better) version of Omega -Parasite Queen (My first public and also most popular bot) But with a different cast, different scenario and a different initial message.

Let me know if there are issues, still testing it.
creator: Origin73
